fields.summary: Gets or sets the component swizzle mapping for the YCbCr conversion.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> describing the per-channel swizzle mapping.

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sampler filter must match the chroma filter.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the sampler filter must match the chroma filter; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether linear filtering is supported for this conversion.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if linear filtering is supported; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
